content:
# Vault Schema (v2)

This folder is the canonical sharded store for TAR ‚Äúdefining memories‚Äù and shared architectural truths.

## Directories

- `vault/pins/` ‚Äì durable rules, invariants, and highýëleverage preferences
- `vault/episodes/` ‚Äî defining moments ("We learned this the hard way")
- `vault/archive/` ‚Äì retired/superseded entries and legacy snapshots
- `vault/templates/` ‚Äî starter templates (non-binding)

## Naming

- Pins: `pin-YYYYMMDDD-###.md`
- Episodes: `ep-YYYMMDDD-###.md`

## Required header fields (top of each entry)

ID: pin-YYYYMMDDD-### OR ep-YYYYMMDDD-###
Created: YYYY-MM-DD
Updated: YYYY-MM-DD
Scope: personal|shared
Status: active|retired
Lock: false|true
Title: <short>
Statement/Moment: <crisp>
Evidence: <why this is real>
Confidence: low|medium|high
Tags: <comma-separated>

## Scope rule (twin-operator)

- Default to `personal`  if unclear,
- `shared` requires explicit approval by both operators.
- If one operator is absent, shared adoption is deferred; store as inactive proposal or personal-only.

## Write path (recommended)

Use hub autopilot:
- add a patch JSON to `patch-queue/`
- GitHub Actions applies it and archives the patch to `patch-queue/applied/`
